likely_response.local: Pode pagar no caixa, na entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO KEYE-shuh, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier, at the entrance.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier, at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NOO KEYE-shuh, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Pode pagar no caixa, na entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bar counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o balcão de bar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH BAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The bar counter serves as a casual hub for drinks and light snacks before or after meals.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o balcão fica na sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW bahl-KOWN FEE-kuh NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the bar counter is in the main room.

responses.english: Good morning, the bar counter is in the main room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW bahl-KOWN FEE-kuh NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, o balcão fica na sala principal.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa.

phrases.cultural_note: Table payment is common, but many venues also operate a central cashier near the entrance for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, paga na mesa ou na entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAH-guh NUH MEH-zuh OHW NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, pay at the table or at the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, pay at the table or at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PAH-guh NUH MEH-zuh OHW NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, paga na mesa ou na entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh fish counters are standard in Portuguese seafood restaurants, allowing guests to select daily catches directly.

likely_response.local: O balcão de peixe está na sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The fish counter is in the main room.

responses.english: The fish counter is in the main room.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: O balcão de peixe está na sala principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese restaurants, a fish counter often displays fresh catch; staff are used to location questions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, balcão de peixe na sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the fish counter is in the main room.

responses.english: Good morning, the fish counter is in the main room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, balcão de peixe na sala principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main dining room is
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese restaurants typically separate the main dining area from bar or terrace zones to manage noise and service flow.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the main dining room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the main dining room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala principal.
